summary: Frontend testing of Yrvante website (iteration 28). Tested 3 NEW user-requested changes: 1) Popup removal (ThemeChooser+CookieBanner removed from App.js), 2) Global glassmorphism (bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-sm on all card elements), 3) Mobile shopping cart icon next to hamburger menu. All 17 tests PASSED.
passed_tests: 1. PASS: No cookie banner on page load
2. PASS: No theme chooser modal on page load
3. PASS: Homepage hero section loads directly without popups
4. PASS: Desktop shopping cart icon visible (data-testid='nav-cart-icon')
5. PASS: Dark mode toggle works - dark class applied
6. PASS: DIENSTEN dropdown works - shows Webdesign, Rebranding, Onderhoud links
7. PASS: MEER dropdown works - shows Over Mij, Waarom een Website?, Blog links
8. PASS: Mobile shopping cart icon visible (data-testid='mobile-cart-icon')
9. PASS: Mobile cart icon links to /calculator
10. PASS: Mobile hamburger menu opens and shows navigation links
11. PASS: No cookie banner or theme chooser on mobile
12. PASS: Homepage pricing cards have glassmorphism (4 cards with bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-sm)
13. PASS: /pakketten page has glassmorphism (22 elements found)
14. PASS: All 4 pricing cards visible on /pakketten (€349, €500, €900, €1400)
15. PASS: /calculator page has glassmorphism (10 elements found)
16. PASS: YRVA10 discount code works correctly (€900 -> €810)
17. PASS: /diensten page has glassmorphism (53 elements found)
18. PASS: /over-mij page has glassmorphism (5 elements found)
19. PASS: Homepage contact section has glassmorphism (6 elements)
20. PASS: Homepage has 34 total glassmorphism elements
critical_code_review_comments: ThemeChooser and CookieBanner correctly removed from App.js render (line 247 comment confirms removal)
Glassmorphism pattern consistently applied: bg-white/60 dark:bg-neutral-800/60 backdrop-blur-sm with border-*/50 opacity borders
Mobile shopping cart icon correctly placed next to hamburger menu with data-testid='mobile-cart-icon'
Desktop shopping cart icon visible with data-testid='nav-cart-icon' linking to /calculator
All pages maintain consistent glassmorphism styling across light and dark modes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28: Tested 3 user-requested changes - 1) Popup removal: ThemeChooser and CookieBanner removed from App.js render, page loads directly without any modal. 2) Glassmorphism: bg-white/60 dark:bg-neutral-800/60 backdrop-blur-sm applied to all card elements across homepage, /pakketten, /calculator, /diensten, /over-mij pages. 3) Mobile cart icon: ShoppingCart icon added next to hamburger menu with data-testid='mobile-cart-icon' linking to /calculator. All navigation dropdowns (DIENSTEN, MEER) work correctly. YRVA10 discount code gives 10% off (€900 -> €810). Dark mode toggle functional.
